completed_deep_dives.name: Storage Architecture Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: PostgreSQL split-brain (primary:5432 + AGE:5455), Qdrant in-memory data loss risk, 3 vector DBs (Qdrant/Milvus/ConPort), recommend Milvus migration

completed_deep_dives.name: Search/Retrieval Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: ConPort 384-dim vs dope-context 1024-dim embeddings, semantic search duplication, recommend remove ConPort embeddings and keep PostgreSQL FTS

completed_deep_dives.name: ADHD Mechanism Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: 23+ hardcoded thresholds across 4 services (Serena/ADHD Engine/ConPort/dope-context), inconsistent values (cognitive load 0.6 vs 0.7 vs 0.8), recommend ADHDConfigService centralization with 7-day migration

content.current_focus: Architecture Consolidation Deep Dives - Session 5/6 Complete
content.session_summary: Completed 5 deep dives: Storage (Decision #4), Search/Retrieval (Decision #5), ADHD Mechanisms (Decision #6), MCP Consolidation (Decision #7), Data Flow (Decision #8). Used Zen thinkdeep for systematic 5-step analysis. Major findings: Integration Bridge incomplete, no service mesh, 7 anti-patterns with optimization strategy.

completed_deep_dives.name: Storage Architecture Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: PostgreSQL split-brain (primary:5432 + AGE:5455), Qdrant in-memory data loss risk, 3 vector DBs (Qdrant/Milvus/ConPort), recommend Milvus migration

completed_deep_dives.name: Search/Retrieval Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: ConPort 384-dim vs dope-context 1024-dim embeddings, semantic search duplication, recommend remove ConPort embeddings and keep PostgreSQL FTS

completed_deep_dives.name: ADHD Mechanism Layer
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: 23+ hardcoded thresholds across 4 services (Serena/ADHD Engine/ConPort/dope-context), inconsistent values (cognitive load 0.6 vs 0.7 vs 0.8), recommend ADHDConfigService centralization with 7-day migration

completed_deep_dives.name: MCP Server Consolidation
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: 6 active MCP servers with 5 infrastructure duplication categories (API clients, embeddings, vector DBs, databases, coordination). 3-tier strategy: shared core library (dopemux-core), infrastructure consolidation, maintain MCP independence. -60% code duplication, -16% containers, 17-day roadmap.

completed_deep_dives.name: Data Flow & Call Patterns
completed_deep_dives.key_findings: 7 anti-patterns identified: Phantom Orchestrator (Integration Bridge read-only vs documented orchestrator), Isolated Islands (zero MCP-to-MCP), Unknown Decision Flow, Redis Ghost Bus, Synchronous API Gauntlet (4 MCPs duplicate calls), ConPort Split-Brain, No Circuit Breakers. Service mesh strategy: -75% API costs, -60% latency, +200% throughput. Extends Decision #7 to 21 days (+4).

Deep dive: Data Flow & Call Patterns (anti-patterns, optimization opportunities)
Synthesize findings and update ARCHITECTURE-CONSOLIDATION-SYNTHESIS.md
